programme.desc: Shinnosuke and companions awaken after 100 years of hibernation. Soon, they realise their last shared memory is a mall parking lot, and the group collaborates to get back to Earth.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal awakens with the stern resolution to stay positive to attract good luck. Later, he avoids getting angry at Bhide, Daya, Iyer, Bagha and many others.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finally loses his temper when Bagha asks for leave. Later, his anger grows when Bawri arrives at Gada Electronics.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is pleased that Bawri has agreed to visit his shop daily. Meanwhile, Champaklal does not comply with Jethalal's thinking.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A business association receives a complaint against Jethalal, following which they summon him. Later, Jethalal wonders about the reason for his summon.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal is impressed with Daya's diligence in managing household expenses. Madhavi convinces Bhide to let her go shopping for saris.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide and Dr Hathi plan to educate society members on various health issues. Meanwhile, Dr Hathi details the specific causes and symptoms.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: With no auto rickshaw available, the women of Gokuldham society decide to take the scooter for their shopping trip.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide reprimands Abdul for leaving the bike on the roadside rather than within the society. However, Abdul denies any knowledge of the incident.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gokuldham Society is full of quirky neighbours who laugh, fight, and come together through every challenge. A mix of comedy, emotion, and strong community spirit.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While the women wait at the police station, Bhide and the other men try to trace them since neither Madhavi nor the others are answering their phones.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Inspector Chalu Pande guarantees a persistent search for Bhide's missing vehicle. Meanwhile, the police team tracks the bike's location for a recovery.

programme.title: Aladdin - Naam Toh Suna Hoga
programme.desc: Jinn is terrified to see Aladdin, who soothes and makes him realise his powers. Meanwhile, Umer is heartbroken that Aladdin may not be alive.

programme.title: Aladdin - Naam Toh Suna Hoga
programme.desc: Alladin being Jinn's master, Umer warns him to take good care of Lamp and Jinn. He also clarifies that their possession into the wrong hands can lead to a mishap.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Team CID receives anonymous letters from a killer stating the time and location of the murder. Later, the team carefully analyses every move of the culprit and nabs him when he makes a small mistake.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gadas are quite impressed by Sonu's skills and virtues. Later, Daya wishes they too had a daughter like Sonu.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jathalal asks Daya to go to the hospital and help the family of a friend whose wife is about to deliver a baby. At the hospital, Daya convinces a family against aborting their unborn girl child.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: In Daya's absence, Babita brings Bengali food to the Gada family. Meanwhile, Daya leaves the hospital very late at night.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While returning home late at night, Daya is shocked to see an abandoned baby in a temple. After much contemplation, she decides to take the baby with her.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya tells her family how she found the baby. Everyone wakes up to the baby's wails and gets shocked to see her. Sodhi drives the Gada family to the temple to see if anyone is looking for the baby.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi and the Gadas look around the vicinity to check if anyone is looking for the baby. Champaklal and Jethalal are petrified by the thought of snakes and get into a comical situation.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gada family endure many adventures through the night to keep Khushi comfortable and safe. Jethalal urges Daya to prevent herself from getting too attached to the baby.

programme.title: Yashomati Maiyya Ke Nandlala
programme.desc: Kans's plan is currently being carried out by Shridhar, who is obediently carrying out his instructions. Later, he is successful in persuading Yashoda, and he resides in the same home as Neel Mani.

programme.title: Yashomati Maiyya Ke Nandlala
programme.desc: Shridhar is almost through with the duty assigned to him by Kans. Meanwhile, Neel Mani has new visitors from the neighbouring villages.

programme.title: Superstar Singer
programme.desc: In today's episode of Superstar Singer, the judges, along with the participants celebrate Independence Day in advance. The performances of the participants fill the stage with patriotism.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Pyaarelal doubts his name change, but Anjali shares news of a marriage prospect. Taarak decides to stay in the house all day.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak gets permission to leave work after telling his boss about Pyaarelal's single life. Pyaarelal meets his potential bride, but her family prefer his old name.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The family of a potential bride visit Pyaarelal to check up on him. Anjali proposes that both families should engage in a conversation together to strengthen their bond.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Sharma family visits Taarak while Daya asks Jethalal to go to his house as soon as possible; Taarak and his friends attend a poetry conference.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Sharma family entertains the residents of Gokuldham with great poetry; while chatting with Jethalal and his friends, Mr Sharma says that wives can never keep secrets.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Mr Sharma challenges the men of Gokuldham to tell one secret to their wives and see whether they keep it or not; Jethalal asks Bagha to install security cameras in the society compound.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The men of Gokuldham initiate the challenge of seeing whether their wives can keep secrets. Dr Hathi begins by telling his wife a secret of Bhide's and asking her to not share it with anyone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tells Daya a secret about Taarak and reminds her to not reveal it to anyone; Bhide makes Bagha install security cameras in the society clubhouse.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The women of Gokuldham gather in the clubhouse to talk about their husbands' secrets. Meanwhile, Jethalal and his friends watch them through the security cameras.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The men of Gokuldham confront their wives in the clubhouse and ask them why they would reveal their secrets. They further disclose that they saw them doing this on the CCTV cameras.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya informs Jethalal that she is hosting a garba class for her friends in the clubhouse. Bawree wishes to attend a garba programme and asks Bagha to buy her tickets.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bapuji, Jethalal, and Daya want Bawri and Bagha to get married immediately, and the two are happy with the arrangement.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and Bhide fight over water in the morning. Daya keeps fasting for everyone's health, and Bapuji encourages everyone to fast with her.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tappu teaches Daya to rap, and they end up doing Garba and rapping together. Bapuji finishes Daya's work for her, which impresses Daya.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya asks if Jethalal has planned to do anything because she is preparing a special dish, and wants him to stay in for it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Ekta takes a long time to decide on the saree she wants as the female residents in Gokuldham society go out shopping for her marriage. Jethalal stops eating to ready himself for Daya's special meal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is excited to have Daya's dinner and invites Mehata to feast with him. However, when he arrives home, he learns Daya has been out shopping with the ladies.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While shopping, Madhavi loses her purse with all the important and expensive items inside, and the ladies promise to help her find it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After coming home, Daya faces her upset family. However, she feels relieved to know that they were only pretending to be mad at her.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu, Sonu, and Goli apologise to Bhide for the incident on Republic Day by giving him two movie tickets.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal agrees to help his uncle financially with his wife's treatment. Jethalal visits Taarak's house for a cup of tea.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Craving for a cup of tea, Jethalal visits Taarak's house. However, he cannot seem to find tea anywhere.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Determined to have tea with his breakfast and willing to go to any means necessary for it, Jethalal visits Sodhi and Iyer's house, but he is unsuccessful.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is unable to have a refreshing cup of tea with his breakfast in spite of visiting the houses of all his friends in Gokuldham Society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: In the police station, Inspector Chalu Pandey makes his team take an oath to maintain the cleanliness of the city.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham Society begin to joke about Jethalal's need for tea and gossip about his strange activities with his friends.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal looks through his things and finds his old radio named Gaanelal. He and Jethalal eventually try to switch it on and tune in.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and the kids see someone on the terrace of Gokuldham Society and get a good fright when they investigate.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Just as the kids inform the elders of Gokuldham Society about a white ghost, Gogi gets trapped on the terrace.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham breathe a sigh of relief as they begin believe that their colony is no longer haunted by a ghost, but Gogi begs to differ.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal's life flashes in front of his eyes when he spots a ghost in the society. His worst fears are confirmed when Tapu Sena also claim to have seen the ghost.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As more residents spot a ghost in Gokuldham, they begin to believe that their society is haunted and look for cover.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Popatlal approaches Daya and confides in her about his troubles due to being single, she promises to help him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Popatlal and Daya visit an astrologer to seek advice about Popatlal's marriage, they start preparing for the ritual he asks them to perform.

programme.desc: The preparation for the Maha Shivaratri puja is underway. Jethalal is worried about a big sum of money that he has with him and tries to take it home safely.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While Jethalal is not in his senses, Taarak tries to hide him to avoid embarrassment. Taarak gives excuses and promises to join the residents later for the puja.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: With Jethalal still feeling intoxicated, Taarak hides him in his house and tries his best to bring him back to his senses.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal hopes that his bachelor days might soon be over after hearing about Bhide's cousin's hunt for a groom.

programme.desc: Bagha blames himself for making the tension between Jethalal and Champaklal worse and tries to apologise to Jethalal.

programme.desc: The residents become concerned about the fight between Jethalal and Champaklal and want to help the two reconcile. Jethalal faints after coming back from work.

programme.desc: Taarak tells Champaklal that Jethalal will not eat anything until Champaklal is the one who takes care of him.

programme.desc: Champaklal gets mad at Jethalal again for booking the wrong train tickets. Taarak and Anjali talk about their lives in Gokuldham.

programme.desc: The men of Gokuldham Society try to talk Iyer out of transferring to Chennai. Iyer and Babita are firm on their decision to move.
